fixtures.notes: Pinned baseline: tdf/odftoolkit release v0.13.0 (commit b926a6134a2fee782076500dfc02c47c2d651cff), odfdom module under repo-root Apache-2.0 LICENSE (confirmed via odfdom/LICENSE.txt, same terms). sourceUri is a permalink to the exact reviewed commit; sha256 was computed from the downloaded fixture at that commit. Fixture binary is not redistributed in this repo per docs/odf-official-corpus-sources.md; place the downloaded file at the path above under ODFKIT_PARITY_CORPUS_ROOT before running validate-corpus without --metadata-only.
